Title: ArtificialIntelligence.com
Text:
AI.com sold for $70 million in 2025 — the largest publicly disclosed domain sale ever recorded. The buyer, Kris Marszalek, CEO of Crypto.com, paid a record sum for the two-letter abbreviation. ArtificialIntelligence.com is the full name behind that abbreviation. The race to own artificial intelligence has never been more fierce — or more valuable.
There are thousands of AI-related domains. There is only one ArtificialIntelligence.com. It carries the full, unambiguous, globally understood name of the category — in the .com extension that remains the undisputed gold standard of digital identity. No hyphens. No abbreviations. No alternatives. Just the name itself.
Instantly positions the owner as the definitive voice in artificial intelligence — before a single word of content is published.
The .com extension, combined with the full category name, signals legitimacy and permanence to every audience worldwide.
Once acquired, it will not return to market.
Exact-match domain for the world's most searched technology keyword — delivering organic traffic and authority from day one.
We facilitate confidential discussions between serious buyers and the domain owner.
After initial qualification, interested parties can submit offers, engage in negotiation if necessary, and complete the transaction through a secure domain escrow service.
Act Now
Don’t miss this rare opportunity to secure THE domain that will define your position in the Artificial Intelligence revolution.
